prompt: aria 的 state-scanner 在我项目上跑到一半报错了：'Cannot read property phases of undefined'，然后直接退出。我的 .aria/config.json 配置文件是有的，macOS 系统。帮我把这个 bug 报给 Aria 维护团队。
assertions: Should classify as Bug Report and use structured template with reproduction steps and expected/actual behavior
Should collect environment information (plugin version, skills count, OS, config status)
Should show complete issue content for user confirmation before submission
Should route to correct repository (Forgejo 10CG/Aria or GitHub 10CG/aria-plugin)
